creator: vermaden@interia.pl
text:
Hi,

I just did that:
# pkg_delete -x openbox
# pkg_add -r openbox

So I had all needed dependencies installed, right?

... and the problem is still there, so I assume its not dependencies proble=
m.

pkg_add/pkg_delete did not showed any warnings/errors.

If I could help in any other way, let me know.

Regards,
vermaden


"Roman Bogorodskiy" <novel@FreeBSD.org> pisze:
> Hi,
>=20
> Did openbox print some warnings and errors when it was installed using
> package? I've got a report that it has a missing imlib dependency, I'm
> working on fixing that but I'm not sure if it's related to the runtime
> problems...
>=20
> Roman Bogorodskiy
>=20




--=20
